requirement_topic.en: ANACOM Mandatory Type Approval for Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ANACOM无线电及电信终端设备强制型号认证
requirement_topic.zht: ANACOM無線電及電信終端設備強制型號認證

summary.en: All radio devices and telecommunications terminal equipment imported into or sold in Timor-Leste must obtain mandatory type approval from ANACOM (Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações — National Communications Authority) under Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications. The requirement covers Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT, and any device operating in licensed or unlicensed radio frequency bands. Applicants must submit a technical file including product description, circuit diagrams, test reports, and a declaration of conformity. Test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories are accepted. Portuguese-language documentation may be required, reflecting Timor-Leste's official language alongside Tetum. There is no mutual recognition agreement (MRA) between Timor-Leste and the EU (CE mark), the US (FCC), China (SRRC/CCC), or Australia (RCM/ACMA). Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, CCC, CE, and FCC certifications are not recognised by ANACOM and do not substitute for Timor-Leste type approval.
summary.zh: 所有进口至东帝汶或在东帝汶销售的无线电设备及电信终端设备，须依据《2021年第3号电子通信法》取得ANACOM（Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações——国家通信管理局）的强制型号认证。该要求涵盖Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网及任何在授权或非授权无线频段运行的设备。申请人须提交技术文件，包括产品描述、电路图、测试报告及符合性声明。ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的测试报告可被接受。鉴于葡语与德顿语同为官方语言，可能需要提供葡语文件。东帝汶与欧盟（CE标志）、美国（FCC）、中国（SRRC/CCC）或澳大利亚（RCM/ACMA）之间不存在相互认可协定（MRA）。中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可、CCC、CE及FCC认证均不被ANACOM承认，不能替代东帝汶型号认证。
summary.zht: 所有進口至東帝汶或在東帝汶銷售的無線電設備及電信終端設備，須依據《2021年第3號電子通信法》取得ANACOM（Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações——國家通信管理局）的強制型號認證。該要求涵蓋Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、物聯網及任何在授權或非授權無線頻段運行的設備。申請人須提交技術文件，包括產品描述、電路圖、測試報告及符合性聲明。ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的測試報告可被接受。鑒於葡語與德頓語同為官方語言，可能需要提供葡語文件。東帝汶與歐盟（CE標誌）、美國（FCC）、中國（SRRC/CCC）或澳大利亞（RCM/ACMA）之間不存在相互認可協定（MRA）。中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可、CCC、CE及FCC認證均不被ANACOM承認，不能替代東帝汶型號認證。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications (Lei n.o 3/2021 sobre as Comunicações Eletrónicas) — Timor-Leste
ANACOM type approval procedure for radio and telecommunications terminal equipment
ITU Radio Regulations (Timor-Leste is an ITU member state)
ILAC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (MRA) — accepted basis for test laboratory accreditation

summary.en: For wireless devices exported from China, the domestic certification chain includes: (1) SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval issued by MIIT for devices using radio frequencies; (2) MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for terminal equipment connecting to public telecommunications networks; (3) CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA for applicable product categories. Chinese manufacturers hold test reports to GB standards from CNAS-accredited laboratories. None of these Chinese approvals are recognised by Timor-Leste ANACOM.
summary.zh: 从中国出口的无线设备，国内认证链包括：（1）MIIT颁发的无线电型号核准（SRRC）；（2）适用于接入公共电信网络终端设备的MIIT进网许可证（NAL）；（3）CNCA主管的中国强制认证（CCC）（适用于在强制认证范围内的产品）。中国制造商持有CNAS认可实验室出具的GB标准测试报告。上述中国认证均不被东帝汶ANACOM承认。
summary.zht: 從中國出口的無線設備，國內認證鏈包括：（1）MIIT頒發的無線電型號核准（SRRC）；（2）適用於接入公共電信網路終端設備的MIIT進網許可證（NAL）；（3）CNCA主管的中國強制認證（CCC）（適用於在強制認證範圍內的產品）。中國製造商持有CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB標準測試報告。上述中國認證均不被東帝汶ANACOM承認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) — YD/T terminal equipment standards
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA / GB 4943.1 safety; GB/T 9254 EMC
GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, CCC, CE, and FCC certifications provide no exemption from Timor-Leste ANACOM mandatory type approval under Law No. 3/2021. A separate ANACOM type approval is required for every device model. No MRA exists between Timor-Leste and China, the EU, the US, or Australia for telecommunications device approval. Test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories are accepted, which can reduce re-testing burden if existing reports cover the relevant standards. Portuguese-language documentation may be required. Timor-Leste's small market size and limited enforcement capacity mean practical enforcement may be inconsistent, but legal non-compliance risk remains.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可、CCC、CE及FCC认证对东帝汶ANACOM依据《2021年第3号电子通信法》的强制型号认证要求不提供任何豁免。每款设备型号均须单独取得ANACOM型号认证。东帝汶与中国、欧盟、美国或澳大利亚之间不存在电信设备认证相互认可协定。ILAC/MRA认可实验室出具的测试报告可被接受，若现有报告已涵盖相关标准，可减少重复测试负担。可能需要提供葡语文件。东帝汶市场规模小且监管执法能力有限，实际执法可能不一致，但法律合规风险依然存在。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可、CCC、CE及FCC認證對東帝汶ANACOM依據《2021年第3號電子通信法》的強制型號認證要求不提供任何豁免。每款設備型號均須單獨取得ANACOM型號認證。東帝汶與中國、歐盟、美國或澳大利亞之間不存在電信設備認證相互認可協定。ILAC/MRA認可實驗室出具的測試報告可被接受，若現有報告已涵蓋相關標準，可減少重複測試負擔。可能需要提供葡語文件。東帝汶市場規模小且監管執法能力有限，實際執法可能不一致，但法律合規風險依然存在。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANACOM type approval required for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment under Law No. 3/2021; no equivalence with CE, FCC, SRRC, MIIT NAL, or CCC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all radio-frequency devices; MIIT NAL for terminal equipment connecting to public networks; CCC for applicable product categories under CNCA; GB standards compliance required

source.publisher: ANACOM — Autoridade Nacional das Comunicações, Timor-Leste

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ANACOM type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported into or sold in Timor-Leste under Law No. 3/2021 on Electronic Communications. No equivalence exists with CE, FCC, Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, or CCC certifications. ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory test reports are accepted. Portuguese-language documentation may be required. Timor-Leste's small market and limited enforcement capacity do not eliminate legal compliance obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《2021年第3号电子通信法》，ANACOM型号认证是所有进口至东帝汶或在东帝汶销售的无线电及电信终端设备的强制要求。与CE、FCC、中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可或CCC认证不存在等效认可。ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告可被接受。可能需要提供葡语文件。东帝汶市场规模小且执法能力有限，但不免除法律合规义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《2021年第3號電子通信法》，ANACOM型號認證是所有進口至東帝汶或在東帝汶銷售的無線電及電信終端設備的強制要求。與CE、FCC、中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可或CCC認證不存在等效認可。ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告可被接受。可能需要提供葡語文件。東帝汶市場規模小且執法能力有限，但不免除法律合規義務。
